prompt: A photorealistic daytime street-corner exterior of a modern BURGER KING fast-food restaurant, viewed from a front-left angle under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. The building has a beige stucco facade with a bold red trim band along the roofline, a large round brand logo near the upper left of the front wall, and oversized red channel letters spelling BURGER KING across the top. On the right side of the facade, show one tall vertical menu billboard with 6 visible product panels and prices: Whopper $6.99, Impossible Whopper $7.49, Chicken Fries $3.49, Onion Rings $2.49, a 2 for $6 Mix or Match panel, and a $3 Your Way Meal panel with fries and drink. Include a black drive-thru canopy on the left side with the text DRIVE THRU, and 2 cars in the lane, one dark SUV closer to camera and one silver sedan ahead. The front corner should have floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing a lit interior with a few customers and menu boards faintly visible. Place 1 hiring poster in the front window reading Now Hiring. Add neatly maintained landscaping with 5 shrubs in dark mulch beds along the building edge, a concrete sidewalk in the foreground, a grassy strip, utility poles, traffic lights, and a suburban roadside intersection extending into the left background. Natural midday lighting, crisp shadows, commercial real-estate photography look, ultra-clean signage, highly legible text, realistic reflections on glass, sharp architectural details, and a subtle white Pollo.ai watermark in the top-right corner.
